code: import axios from"axios";import{useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const EventBooking=()=>{const[form,setForm]=useState({name:"",email:"",phone:"",event_date:"",guests:"",message:""});const handleChange=e=>{setForm({...form,[e.target.name]:e.target.value});};const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{const res=await axios.post("http://localhost:5000/api/event-booking",form);alert(res.data);}catch(err){console.error(err);alert("Error submitting booking");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{name:"name",placeholder:"Name",onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{name:"email",placeholder:"Email",onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{name:"phone",placeholder:"Phone",onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"date",name:"event_date",onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{name:"guests",placeholder:"Guests",onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("textarea",{name:"message",placeholder:"Message",onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Send Request"})]});};export default EventBooking;
